name: dairy-agent
description: AI agent for dairy farm management (read/write tool split with human-in-the-loop confirmation).

scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && concurrently -n server,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w web"
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:shared && npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w web
